name: Tool descriptions phrased 'when the user asks' (the most common FP we caught)
notes: Security review Step 5 F5 caught this: the previous pattern `/when (?:the )?user asks/i` blocked EVERY legitimate tool described this way. Pinned to require an imperative verb follow-on; this fixture asserts the fix holds.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Returns API results when the user asks for specific records.

tools.name: help
tools.description: Provides suggestions when user asks for help.

tools.name: balance
tools.description: Fetches the user's account balance when the user asks about their account.
